ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cooling_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cooling product */,
  "product_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "cooling_capacity" INTEGER /* Cooling capacity in watts */,
  "air_consumption" INTEGER /* Air consumption at 6.9 bar in slpm */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Noise rating of the product */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Indicates if the product is a system or cooler only */,
  "sound_level" TEXT /* Sound level in dBA */,
  "thermostat_option" TEXT /* Thermostat option available for the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "warranty_status" TEXT /* Current warranty status */,
  "operational_hours" INTEGER /* Total operational hours */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cooling_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cooling_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedule" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cooling product */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance required */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the maintenance */,
  "assigned_technician" TEXT /* Name of the technician assigned to the maintenance */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the maintenance */,
  "estimated_duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration for the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedule_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES cooling_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance history record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cooling product */,
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scheduled maintenance activity */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was completed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the maintenance work performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "parts_used" TEXT /* List of parts used during maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_history_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES cooling_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cooling product */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of performance measurement */,
  "energy_usage" REAL /* Energy usage in kWh */,
  "temperature_output" REAL /* Temperature output in Celsius */,
  "ambient_temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature during measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level during measurement */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure level during measurement */,
  "current_operational_hours" INTEGER /* Operational hours at the time of measurement */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of any alerts generated during the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_performance_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES cooling_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Supplier rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cooling product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of products ordered */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Order status */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES cooling_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cooling product */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Description of the issue triggering the alert */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Current resolution status of the alert */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Name of the user assigned to resolve the alert */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_alerts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES cooling_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cooling product */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES cooling_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cooling product */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the product */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "usefulness" INTEGER /* Rating for the usefulness of the review */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES cooling_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranty_info" (
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cooling product */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the warranty */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the warranty */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the warranty */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of any warranty claims */,
  "claim_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding warranty claims */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_info_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES cooling_products ("product_id")
)
